title: fragaria nilgerrensis var. mairei
intro: Fragaria nilgerrensis var. mairei, also known as the Himalayan strawberry, is a lesser-known variety of the Fragaria nilgerrensis species, which is a type of wild strawberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragaria nilgerrensis var. mairei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves for various health issues.
